channel.title: Sisters of Summerville
channel.description: Daily comic strip featuring Honey Bear the Yorkie and Bootsie Belle the tuxedo cat with every day humor and sass in Summerville, South Carolina.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ 250th Carolina Day! ⚔️🇺🇸
item.description:
Mom, Dad, Honey Bear, and Bootsie Belle look back upon June 28, 1776 as we celebrate the 250th anniversary of Carolina Day! Dressed in their Revolutionary War finest, the Sisters reenact the epic defense of Fort Sullivan, where South Carolina Patriots stood courageously against the mighty British fleet and proved that determination could overcome overwhelming odds. 🇺🇸🐾 The victory at the Battle of Sullivan’s Island became one of the first great American triumphs of the Revolutionary War. The fort’s ingenious palmetto log walls absorbed British cannon fire, forcing the Royal Navy to retreat and protecting Charleston for years. The battle provided a tremendous boost to Patriot morale just days before the Declaration of Independence was adopted, demonstrating that the British military was not invincible. ⭐⚓ The famous Liberty Flag, with its distinctive white crescent on a blue field, flew proudly over the fort and became one of the enduring symbols that helped inspire South Carolina’s state flag and the spirit of American liberty. 🌴🌙 Happy 250th Carolina Day, South Carolina! May we always remember the courage, sacrifice, and unwavering resolve of those who stood their ground in defense of freedom. ❤️🤍💙

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🖤🐈‍⬛ Femme Fatale of the Feline World! 🐈‍⬛🖤
item.description:
Whether Bootsie Belle is strutting like she owns the room or effortlessly convincing Dad to hand out chin scratches, Honey Bear quickly discovers that some cats don’t chase attention, they simply attract it. With plenty of Southern sass, playful rivalry, and feline charm, this comic proves that she truly is the femme fatale of the feline world! 🐈‍⬛👑 And there’s even an original song to go with this episode! I wrote and produced “Femme Fatale of the Feline World” to capture Bootsie Belle’s smooth swagger, irresistible confidence, and mischievous personality. 😼💚 Give it a listen here: 👉 https://suno.com/s/AuX5d2DgkNyMFgiD 🎵🎶

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾☀️️ Front Porch Philosophy ☀️️🐾
item.description:
Sometimes the greatest adventures don’t happen far from home…they happen right on the front porch. Honey Bear, Bootsie Belle, and Dad share a quiet sunrise while pondering a morning full of big questions, gentle laughter, and a little Southern wisdom. ☕🦋 From mysterious mailmen to surprise sprinkler attacks, the Sisters discover that life’s best lessons often arrive with a warm cup of coffee, good company, and a willingness to slow down. Because sometimes, the best answers arrive slower than the questions! ❤️🌼

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🎮 OutSmart Kitty! 🎮🐾
item.description:
Honey Bear just couldn’t resist a little mischief! Armed with a remote control, she secretly activates the Instincts SmartyKat Electronic Motion Hidden Hijinks Cat Toy just as her unsuspecting sister Bootsie Belle strolls by. 😼💥🐶 Suddenly the hidden arm starts swishing beneath the mat…then stops…then starts again! Poor Bootsie Belle can’t decide if the toy is broken or if it’s playing tricks on her—until she spots Honey Bear’s smug grin from across the room! One perfectly timed pounce later… SMASH!💥The remote is history, and Honey Bear learns that you should never underestimate a clever tuxedo cat! 😏🐾😼

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 📦🐶 The Cardboard Kingdom! 🐱📦
item.description:
When a mountain of Amazon boxes arrive, Honey Bear sees treasure…and Bootsie Belle sees opportunity! Before long, the living room has become a towering medieval fortress complete with castles, drawbridges, and royal thrones. Honey Bear bravely defends the kingdom while Queen Bootsie Belle rules from her cardboard throne. But poor Dad discovers that reaching the kitchen now requires crossing the realm! Fortunately, Mom knows something every good queen knows…there’s always a secret passage. Sometimes the greatest kingdoms are built from the simplest things! ❤️😄

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾😂 Get out the MOAT! 😂🐾
item.description:
What happens when Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle mishear the news on Primary Runoff Election Day? Instead of hearing “Get out the VOTE!”, they hear “Get out the MOAT!”🏰💦 It’s a hilarious case of crossed wires, determined digging, and one very confused family—plus a gentle reminder that every vote counts…even if you don’t need a moat to protect your full-fledged medieval fortress! 😸🐶

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🕰️🐾 Honey Bear & Bootsie Belle’s Excellent Adventure! 🐾🕰️
item.description:
What starts out as a mysterious glowing phone booth in Summerville quickly becomes the most excellent adventure yet! After a wild trip through time, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover the rich history of the Edisto people, part of the Cusabo American Indians, who lived along South Carolina’s rivers and coast long before European settlers arrived. 🐶🐱 Through laughter, fishing lessons, and warm hospitality, our furry sisters learn that some of the greatest adventures come from understanding the people who first called this beautiful land home along with history, humor, friendship…and one very tiny fish. 🐟❤️

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🏆🎉 Father’s Day Trophy! 🎉🏆
item.description:
Sometimes the greatest awards aren’t made of gold…they’re made with love, a dog bowl, a tennis ball, a squeaky toy, a spoon, and just a little bit of super glue! ❤️😂 When Honey Bear decides Dad deserves a trophy, Bootsie Belle is all in. The result? A one-of-a-kind masterpiece that proves the best gifts don’t come from a store…they come from the heart! 🐶💖🐱 Happy Father’s Day to all the amazing dads, grandpas, stepdads, pet dads, and father figures who make life a little brighter every day! 👨‍👧‍👦🎂

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: ☀️🔥 Rising Heatwave! 🧊❄️
item.description:
As Summerville bakes under a brutal triple-digit heatwave, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decide that desperate times call for desperately ridiculous inventions! 🥵🔥 Will their over-the-top cooling machines save the day…or turn the neighborhood into the coolest attraction in South Carolina? Only Jack Frost knows for sure! ❄️😂

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🔴 The RED Dot! 🔴🐾
item.description:
A tiny red dot appears…and Bootsie unleashes a full-blown CAT-NADO! Honey Bear answers with the unstoppable YORKIE-CANE! Furniture trembles, pillows fly, chaos reigns…and then the dot suddenly disappears.🐈🌪️🐶 The sisters discover the shocking truth: Dad was behind the RED Dot the whole time! Sometimes the greatest mystery isn’t what you’re chasing…but rather WHO’s making you chase it! 😂❤️

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🤖🎉 Dad’s AI Birthday! 🎂🎈
item.description:
What happens when Honey Bear decides to let artificial intelligence plan Dad’s birthday? Apparently AI believes 437 balloons, three cakes, confetti cannons, a marching band, and a fog machine are the minimum requirements for a proper celebration! 🎂🎈 Honey Bear is convinced the computer is a birthday genius while Bootsie Belle has her doubts, and poor Dad discovers that sometimes the smartest machine in the room still misses the simplest request…“I only wanted pie.”🥧😆

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: ⏰🎨 Time Chasers (Part Two)! 🌀😹
item.description:
Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle thought they had discovered the ultimate dinner hack…just move the clock ahead! But this time, they didn’t just change the time, they ripped a hole in reality itself! As clocks melt, the house twists into a surreal dreamscape, and Time decides it’s had enough of their shenanigans! 😱⏰ Can the sisters outrun an angry clock? Or will Mom once again prove she’s the true keeper of order by stitching the fabric of time back together? One thing’s for sure…some lessons are timeless! 💖😉

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 😼⏰ Time Chasers (Part One) ⏰🐶
item.description:
When dinner feels a hundred years away, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decide that waiting is simply not an option! With empty bowls, rumbling tummies, and a suspiciously cooperative wall clock, the sisters hatch a scheme worthy of the finest feline-and-canine masterminds of Summerville. While one distracts Mom with paws under the bathroom door, the other takes matters into her own paws! ⏰😹 But this caper has one tiny problem when Dad comes home from fishing. Will the sisters enjoy an early feast, or will their time-bending adventure come to an abrupt end with a little Southern wisdom and a whole lot of sass? The clock may have been fooled, but Mom wasn’t fooled in the end! ⏳🤭

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🍖🐶 Does this make me look Fat? 🐶🍖
item.description:
Mirror, Mirror on the Wall…Honey Bear asks that one question which ends more friendships, family dinners, and porch-swing debates than any other: “Does this collar make me look fat?” 🦴😳 Most folks in Summerville know that question is a trap deeper than a Lowcountry pothole after a thunderstorm! But Bootsie Belle is far too clever to fall for it. With all the confidence of a cat who never doubted herself a single day in her life, Bootsie delivers a brutally honest observation that leaves Honey Bear questioning not her collar, but rather her snack budget! 🍖😼 Sometimes the best sisters tell you what you want to hear…and sometimes they tell you what you need to hear. 😂⭐

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🇺🇸 Old Glory Waves! 🇺🇸
item.description:
Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle take a paws-itively patriotic trip back to 1776 where a very special seamstress named Betsy Ross receives three unexpected visitors with an important mission: help create a flag for a brand-new nation! What started as a debate over six-pointed stars, five-pointed stars, circles, stripes, and a few sleepy interruptions soon became the story behind one of the most recognizable symbols in the world. 🇺🇸🐾 Join Honey Bear, Bootsie Belle, Gumbo, and Hershey as they explore the legend of America’s first flag and discover how a nation that began with 13 colonies grew into 50 states, while “Old Glory” continues to wave proudly through it all. From colonial Philadelphia to Historic Downtown Summerville, this heartwarming adventure celebrates history, ingenuity, and the enduring spirit of the American flag. ❤️🤍💙

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: New Character: Caddy Hack (the gofer)
item.description:
Meet Caddy Hack (the gofer)! Caddy Hack is a gofer who is very mischievous, loud, unapologetic, loves golf courses, and causing trouble.

👉 Meet Caddy Hack (the gofer) on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: ⛳🐾 Dad’s Gone Gofering! 🐾⛳
item.description:
What starts as a peaceful morning on the golf course quickly turns into an all-out turf war when Dad becomes obsessed with tracking a certain furry troublemaker. Armed with a handful of clubs, a suspicious amount of determination, and absolutely no understanding of gofer real estate law, Dad sets out on a mission that feels strangely familiar to fans of a certain classic golf comedy. 🏌️😏 Meanwhile, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle provide expert commentary from the sidelines as this particularly awnry gofer proves that when it comes to golf, possession is nine-tenths of the scorecard. By the time the final putt rolls toward the cup, everyone learns an important lesson: “Never trust a gofer who thinks the golf course is built on top of his house!” 😂⛳🐹

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🎬🐶 Conveyor Belt Chaos 😼🎬
item.description:
This adventure was inspired by one of Bootsie Belle’s cat dreams after falling asleep to “I Love Lucy” reruns! 📺💤 When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle land jobs at the Treats 4 Every Pet factory, everything seems simple enough until the conveyor belt kicks into overdrive! With treat zoomies and pure panic flying in every direction, the sisters resort to some very creative Southern engineering to keep up with the conveyor belt! 🍪🐭 Hats overflow, uniforms bulge, and Spot the Hairless Cat starts asking some uncomfortable questions. Treats 4 Every Pet reported record production…and record losses! 😼🐶

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🏴‍☠️ Hidden Treasures 🏴‍☠️🐾
item.description:
Some chores feel like work…while others may feel like an adventure! Because sometimes all it takes is one clever idea, one eager treasure hunter, and one very suspicious cat. 😹🐶 When Mom orders the girls clean up the living room, Bootsie Belle schemes up a totally marvelous idea to trick Honey Bear to hunt for hidden treasures. Fans of a certain classic tale about convincing someone else to do the work may notice a familiar trick hiding between the lines! 📚😏

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🕰️🌎 Key Moments of History 🌎🕰️
item.description:
When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle open the family history book, they don’t just find old memories…they uncover the key moments in time! From Cleopatra-level cat attitude to one small step for Yorkie-kind, the sisters discover that history may be full of greatness, mystery, and maybe just a little too much Bootsie Belle being in charge! 🚀👑🐾

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🗳️🐾 What Would You Vote For? 🐾🗳️
item.description:
Election Day has arrived in Summerville, and when Mom explains that primary voting is about choosing what you want to vote for in November, our two Sisters take the idea very seriously! Honey Bear launches a campaign for more treats and mandatory belly rubs, while Bootsie Belle promises toy spiders for all and an Open Patio Door Policy. 🐶🐱 But when the sisters ask Dad when they get to cast their votes, he reminds them that around this house, they already do! A lighthearted, nonpartisan adventure about dreams, priorities, and the furry little voters who already seem to run the household! ❤️😄

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🎣🐟 Go Fish! 🐟🎣
item.description:
When Mom fires up the Kamado Joe and starts smoking a batch of delicious salmon, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle decide there’s only one thing to do while they wait…play a game of Go Fish! 🔥🐟 At first, Honey Bear is all confidence. But as the smoky aroma drifts across the backyard, her attention starts swimming away from the cards and straight toward the grill. Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle stays focused, quietly collecting matches and racking up points as they both discover that when Mom’s cooking, the real winner is always Mom! 🐶😂😼

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🥋😼 Karate Cat! 🥋😼
item.description:
When Bootsie Belle returns home wearing a karate black belt after defeating a pack of bully dogs, Honey Bear decides she wants to become a karate master too! 😲 So under Sensei Bootsie’s watchful eye, Honey Bear learns the ancient arts of “Dig On, Dig Off”, “Chase the Leaf”, and “Paw Up, Paw Down” along with beachside balance. The only problem is Honey Bear has the enthusiasm of a champion, but the coordination of a tumbleweed in a hurricane! 🐶🐾

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾✨ Catnip Overdose! ✨🐾
item.description:
One innocent squeaky toy, one overconfident tuxedo cat, and one industrial-strength container of catnip were all it took to launch Summerville’s favorite sisters straight into the wildest trip this side of the galaxy! 🚀😵‍💫 As reality melts into rainbow spirals, the living room becomes an interdimensional vortex where moons bark, colors sing, laser dots rule the cosmos, and even Pine Forest couldn’t prepare them for what comes next. Will Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle unlock the secrets of the universe, or just wake up with the world’s worst catnip hangover? 🎶😹🐾

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🪲 Invasion of the Japanese Beatles! 🪲
item.description:
When mysterious “Japanese Beatles” arrive in Summerville, Honey Bear is convinced John, Paul, George, and Ringo have come back for one more reunion tour! 🎶🎸 Fortunately, Bootsie Belle quickly discovers these visitors are a lot more interested in Mom’s vegetable garden than making music. Mom springs into action with her secret weapon: the mighty Bag-a-Bug Japanese Beetle Trap! 💪🪤

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🌧️⚡ Summer Storm Watch! ⚡🌧️
item.description:
Southern thunderstorms are a whole different breed! Up North, a storm might pass through. But in Summerville, it sounds like the storm moved in, unpacked its bags, and decided to stay for dinner.🐶😹 When thunder rattles the windows and lightning lights up the sky in Summerville, Honey Bear is convinced the apocalypse has arrived! Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle remains perfectly calm…until a far greater threat emerges from the darkness: 🔴 The Red Dot! ⚡

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: New Character: General Frog
item.description:
Meet General Frog! An American Green Tree Frog (Hyla cinerea), this General leads from the pond! Disciplined, brave, strategic, and fair, he leads with honor and expects the best from others. LIKES: • Dewy mornings • Order and duty • Protecting the pond • A job well done DISLIKES: • Careless campers • Pollution • Loud…

👉 Meet General Frog on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐸🐾 Garage Tree Frog 🐾🐸
item.description:
Sometimes the biggest adventures in Summerville come in the smallest packages! When a tiny tree frog wandered into the garage, Honey Bear saw a towering amphibian menace, Bootsie Belle forged a diplomatic alliance, and General Frog quietly carried out his mission. 😂🐸 But fortunately, Dad handled the relocation while Mom documented the whole historic encounter! 🐸✨💚

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: New Character: Mom Pixie Curl
item.description:
Meet Mom Pixie Curl! Mom get a new hairdo with Pixie Curls and there are mixed feelings about it! But even Bootsie Belle warms up to the new style and her Mom over time!

👉 Meet Mom Pixie Curl on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 💇‍♀️✨Salon for Pixie Curls! ✨💇‍♀️
item.description:
Mom is off to the salon for a brand-new pixie curl transformation, and the whole family has opinions! Honey Bear is all-in on the fabulous new look, Dad gives it his official stamp of approval, Big Brother cautiously declares it “different,” and Bootsie Belle needs a full investigation before confirming this curly-haired stranger is in fact…still Mom! 😄💖

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🎲🐾 Sisters of Summerville Petopoly! 🐾🎲
item.description:
Honey Bear was absolutely convinced she was on her way to becoming the richest pet in Summerville. With Treat Stations popping up everywhere and biscuits piling high, victory seemed certain! 🏠😄 But while Honey Bear celebrated every roll of the dice, Bootsie Belle was quietly building her empire one clever move at a time. When the final biscuits were counted, Honey Bear learned an important lesson: winning is fun, but being a good sport is even more important. After all, true champions can smile whether they win or lose! 😺🎀

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🌼😱 Pollen Panic! 😱🌼
item.description:
When we moved to Summerville, I was amazed by the pollen, as we’ve never seen a place where it can turn an entire neighborhood yellow overnight! Which inspired this episode. 🌼🐾 Honey Bear has discovered the mysterious yellow dust coating everything in sight, and she’s convinced catastrophe is at paw! Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle remains perfectly calm as the pollen drifts through the air. Will Honey Bear’s pillow fort save the day? Or is this just another ordinary day in Summerville? 🤧🐶🐱

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: New Character: Dr. Vacuum
item.description:
Meet Dr. Vacuum! A sinister villain, Dr. Vacuum and his Hairball Horde suck up all the treats and toys.

👉 Meet Dr. Vacuum on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🦴 Defenders of the Petaverse, Part II: The Hairball Horde Stronghold! 🦴
item.description:
Deep inside the Hairball Horde Stronghold, the sinister Dr. Vacuum has gathered the greatest stash of stolen toys and treats in history. But he underestimated Summerville’s mightiest heroes! 💥⚡ Bootsie Belle unleashes the legendary Cat Toy Lasso, tangling Hairball Horde minions by the dozen, while Honey Bear proves that no amount of vacuum-suction can stop a determined Yorkie on a mission. As toys fly, portals swirl, and villains face their own inventions, the fate of the Dogi-Verse and Meow-Verse hangs in the balance! 🐶🐱

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾 Defenders of the Petaverse - Part I 🐾
item.description:
Some adventures are simply too big for a single comic strip! When the notorious Doctor Vacuum and his fuzzy army of chaos, The Hairball Horde, descend upon Summerville, they bring one mission: steal every toy, treat, squeaky bone, feather wand, and snack in the entire Pet-a-Verse! ✨ Fortunately, the villains picked the wrong town. Standing between Doctor Vacuum and total pet pandemonium are Honey Bear, Defender of the Dogi-Verse, and Bootsie Belle, Master of the Meow-Verse. Together, the Sisters become the last line of defense against a threat so enormous it will take more than one episode to stop!🐶🐱 Will Summerville survive the Great Toy Heist? Will the Hairball Horde make off with every snack in existence? And can the Sisters stop Doctor Vacuum before the Pet-a-Verse is sucked into chaos? Find out when the adventure continues in Part II this Saturday! 🐾⚡

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🍋 Sweet Tea Emergency! 🧋🚨
item.description:
When disaster strikes a Summerville backyard cookout, Honey Bear discovers the unthinkable, UNSWEET TEA!!! What follows is a full-scale Southern emergency as Bootsie Belle declares a municipal crisis, sugar packets fly, and Honey Bear launches an aggressive operation to restore sweetness to civilization. Thankfully, cooler heads, and sweeter tea, prevail before the burgers are served! 😹🍔

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: New Character: Buggies the Mosquito
item.description:
Meet Buggies the Mosquito! Small but mighty. Big personality. Always buzzing around somewhere! SPECIES: Aedes Sillyus PERSONALITY: Curious, upbeat, and a little bitey. LOVES: Adventure, shiny things, sweet nectar DISLIKES: Bug spray, swatting, rainy days

👉 Meet Buggies the Mosquito on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🦟✨ Citronella Fortress! ✨🦟
item.description:
Summerville mosquito season has officially arrived, and Honey Bear is discovering that the tiny flying vampires of the South do NOT play around! Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle insists she’s maintaining her dignity and composure, right up until both sisters end up hiding inside their ridiculous citronella-powered backyard fortress. 😱🐾 Between buzzing chaos, dramatic panic, and Southern sass, survival may come down to one candle at a time! Because as this Yorkie can attest in Summerville, mosquito season ain’t a season…it’s a lifestyle! 😆🦟

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🌧️ Mudroom Mayhem 🌧️🐾
item.description:
Rainy walks, muddy paws, and one Yorkie absolutely refusing surrender. Honey Bear turns a simple paw cleaning into a full-scale mudroom disaster while Mom tries desperately to restore order. Towels fly, muddy paw prints appear in impossible places, and the floor looks like a hurricane hit it. 🌧️😼 Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle remains perfectly spotless atop her bench throne…waiting for the perfect moment to deliver one of her most legendary mic drops yet! ✨🚿

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🇺🇸 Memorial Decoration Day 🇺🇸
item.description:
🌹 This heartfelt episode of Sisters of Summerville pauses the laughter for a moment of remembrance as Honey Bear, Bootsie Belle, Mom, and Dad reflect on the true meaning behind Memorial Day…started after the Civil War and originally known as “Decoration Day” because people decorated soldiers’ graves with flowers. From rows of honored graves to quiet neighborhood flags and patriotic parades, the sisters learn that freedom carries the stories and sacrifices of those who never made it home. As the sun sets over Summerville, our family remembers the heroes who stood the watch so future generations could live, dream, laugh, and enjoy peaceful evenings together. 🇺🇸 Some gave all…and we must never forget! 🇺🇸

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🧘‍♂️🐾 The Yoga Dog! 🐾🧘‍♀️
item.description:
When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover Benji the Yoga Dog online, they decide it’s finally time to embrace healthy living, inner peace, and apparently gravity-related suffering. 😅 While Bootsie Belle flows through every pose like a true feline yoga master, Honey Bear quickly discovers that balance, flexibility, and “finding your center” are a lot harder when your legs are powered entirely by snacks and chaos. From Cat Pose to Bird Dog disasters, this episode stretches the sisters to their limits…literally!🐶💥 If you‘d like to try yoga, check out Yoga with Adriene and her dog Benji at: https://youtube.com/@yogawithadriene

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🔥🍖 Smoking Hot Butt! 🍖🔥
item.description:
Honey Bear overhears Mom talkin’ about a “smoking hot butt“ and immediately assumes her own fluffy backside is in danger! What follows is pure Summerville chaos as Honey Bear spins into full panic mode. 🐶🐱 Meanwhile Bootsie Belle delivers world-class Southern judgment one paw lick at a time. And Mom and Dad are just tryin’ to enjoy some good backyard barbecue! 😂

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🌶️💃 The Great Salsa Challenge! 💃🌶️
item.description:
The Sisters compete in a “Great Salsa Challenge” but with slightly different interpretations. Bootsie Belle and Spot turn the living room into a whirlwind of elegant salsa dancing! Meanwhile Honey Bear leans more into her stomach with chips, salsa, and snack-time glory! 🕺🌮 But after one very empty salsa bowl and a very confused Yorkie Hershey, the folks come home and Dad wants to know what happened to the chips and salsa dip. Honey Bear still insists she technically competed fair and square.❤️🤣

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐇🐾 Bunny Season! 🐇🐾
item.description:
Honey Bear proudly declares “CAT SEASON!” as she slaps the poster up on the Country Club community board! Bootsie Belle fires back with a “DOG SEASON!” poster! The sisters tear through the neighborhood in a full slap-stick chase worthy of a Saturday morning cartoon classic! Posters fly, chaos erupts, and the truth is finally revealed as the underlying poster is revealed underneath all the shredded paper…😾🐶 It’s actually “BUNNY SEASON!” and now poor Spike the Bunny becomes the newest target as Honey Bear bunny-hops across the yard trying to convince every rabbit she’s “one of them.” The problem? She may have the hops, but she’s still a Yorkie. Luckily for Spike, Honey Bear is all chase and absolutely NO catch! 🐇😆

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🐾🏡 Small Town 🏡🐾
item.description:
Sometimes the richest parts of life have nothin’ to do with money, traffic, or chasing the next big thing. “Small Town” is about slowing down long enough to wave at your neighbors, lend a helping hand, share a casserole, and remember that community is built one conversation at a time. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover that a “small town” feel isn’t really about population numbers at all…it’s about how people choose to treat one another. 🌻💛 This episode was inspired by my song “Small Town,” written from memories of growing up in that kind of world as a kid…where front porches mattered, people knew your name, and the whole village helped raise the next generation. Old fashioned values may be harder to find these days… but maybe that’s exactly why they matter so much. 🎶🏡 Inspired by the song “Small Town”: https://suno.com/s/xJ9NavNSGbUHxe7R

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 😴🐾 Lazy Day! 🐾😴
item.description:
Honey Bear has officially declared herself retired from effort. Why work when snacks, tummy rubs, and cheeseburgers should simply appear on command? Meanwhile, her sister Bootsie Belle watches this “economic strategy” unfold with the kind of Southern side-eye only a tuxedo cat can deliver.🍔☀️ But when Honey Bear starts suggesting nobody should work at all, Bootsie Belle gently reminds her that being adorable is contributing to the household economy. Sometimes wisdom comes wrapped in sass…and sometimes it comes with a pink bow and buffering brain cells. 😆

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🎸😱 Facebook Jail! 😱🎸
item.description:
The MetaBots have finally gone too far and Summerville’s sassiest sisters are officially behind bars! After Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle get locked away by an army of humorless AI enforcers, the duo discovers there’s only one thing stronger than algorithms and “community standards” and that is Southern sass, rock ’n roll, and a good outlaw anthem! 🎶🐾 Inspired by both real life and my original song “Facebook Jail” this episode cranks the Jailhouse Rock energy to maximum volume as the sisters turn digital imprisonment into the hottest concert MetaBots have ever seen! 🎸🔥 🎵 Inspired by the song: https://suno.com/song/4ce2454b-4b7f-4c53-8311-2353fde76698

👉 Read this episode on the Sisters of Summerville website

item.title: 🤖⚡ Sisters of Summerville: “Meta AI Bot Wars!” ⚡🤖
item.description:
Today’s episode proves that sometimes real life is stranger than fiction! Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle find themselves battling mysterious Meta AI Bots after our Facebook account was genuinely flagged for deletion on May 18th…despite no evidence of wrongdoing and no meaningful way to appeal. So if the Sisters suddenly disappear from your feed…that’s why! 🐾
From Southern sass to Northern charm, Bootsie Belle and Honey Bear want to sincerely thank all of you for letting their daily adventures bring a little humor, heart, and chaos into your lives. And don’t worry…the girls still have plenty more adventures ahead. ❤️

item.title: 🌤️🏁 Rush Rush Rush! 🐾💨
item.description:
Today’s episode is inspired by my original song “Rush Rush Rush” which I wrote after noticing how folks seem to rush through everything these days…from blowing through stop signs 🚫 to hurrying through life itself…without slowing down long enough to enjoy the little things. 🎶
Honey Bear may be a Northern transplant Yorkie from Indiana, but around Summerville she still thinks life’s a NASCAR race! Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle knows true Southern wisdom means slowing down, sipping sweet tea, and actually noticing the sunset, the fireflies, and those who love you! Because sometimes life ain’t about getting there faster…it’s about realizing you were already somewhere worth being. 💛✨
🎵 You can listen to my song “Rush Rush Rush” here: https://suno.com/song/1bd4a605-15a3-4867-bfcc-64d8f39731c6

item.title: 🌎🍿 North vs. South! 🍹🐾
item.description:
Honey Bear may have been born up North in Indiana, but down in Summerville, Bootsie Belle is determined to teach her the fine art of Southern living. From soda pop versus sweet tea to charging ahead versus “winning politely,” these two furry sisters discover that different backgrounds can lead to some hilariously different ways of seeing the world. 😆❤️
In the end, one thing becomes clear, Southern charm may not always move fast, but it somehow still walks away with all the snacks. 🐱🧺🐶

item.title: 🩺🐾 Incredibly Brave! 🐾💉
item.description:
Honey Bear marched into the Knightsville Veterinary Clinic with courage in her heart and dramatic concern in her eyes. From brave little shots to post-vet treat negotiations, this episode is packed with determination and dignity! ❤️🐶
With Bootsie Belle, we get the complete Summerville package with southern sass, furry drama, and one very judgmental cat. She remains emotionally supportive from a safe tactical distance while still demanding equal snack compensation. 🐱😅

item.title: 🪿🚸 Gosling Crossing 🚸🪿
item.description:
When Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover that the tiny roadside goose sign is practically invisible, they realize the little waddlers need help fast! So Honey Bear proudly steps up as an official crossing guard while Bootsie Belle takes infrastructure matters into her own paws by installing a brand-new Gosling Crossing sign drivers can actually see. 🐾🦺
Around Pine Forest, protecting Summerville’s goslings is serious business and as the girls would say, “Finally, a sign drivers might actually notice!” 💛🪿

item.title: 🐾🐱 Pet Role Reversal 🐱🐾
item.description:
What happens when Honey Bear starts acting like a cat, and Bootsie Belle decides she’s basically a tiny dramatic dog? Chaos, confusion, and backyard attitude explosions! 🎭💥
From sideways “crab walk” intimidation runs to prairie-dog surveillance poses, these two furballs are slowly becoming each other, and Mom and Dad aren’t sure whether to laugh or call a pet therapist. 😹😂

item.title: 🎮 Multiplayer Mode 🎮
item.description:
Ever wonder what your pets do when you leave them at home alone? When Mom and Dad leave the house one evening, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle transform downtown Summerville into a full-blown Minecraft battleground! From epic daytime building missions to nighttime zombie survival chaos under the glowing café lights, the sisters discover that teamwork, spiders, and cheese puffs may not be the safest combination. 🕷️⚔️🧟
But when Mom and Dad come home unexpectedly, suddenly the pets have to explain why the living room looks one biscuit away from disaster. 😹🤣

item.title: 🌸☕ Best Mommy Ever! ☕🌸
item.description:
Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle had one mission this Mother’s Day…to make Mommy feel like the most loved fur mom in all of Summerville! 🐶💖🐱
With waffles, flowers, giggles, and one very special mug surprise, the whole family comes together for a heartwarming morning full of love, laughter, and just a tiny bit of breakfast-related danger. And remember, nobody panic if the waffle slides. 🧇😄

item.title: 🌽 Farmer’s Market Adventure 🛍️
item.description:
The Sisters hit the farmer’s market to explore what the merchants have to offer this week. Honey Bear turns every free sample table into a personal buffet while Bootsie Belle discovers artisanal lavender soap and immediately evolves into luxury cat royalty. 🍑
Meanwhile, Mom and Dad realize a “quick stop for vegetables” has somehow become a full-blown shopping expedition. 😂

item.title: 🕷️☢️ The Glowfather & DAD-ION! ☢️🕷️
item.description:
When Mom mentions Dad is heading in for a nuclear stress test, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle immediately assume Summerville is about to get its very own radioactive superhero origin story! ⚡💚
From glowing laser eyes and levitating golf carts to an army of radioactive spiders marching across town, the sisters imagine Dad transforming into the unstoppable DAD-ION (as protector of Pine Forest Country Club) or The Glowfather (ruler of the eight-legged legion)! 🕷️⚡
But after all the wild comic-book chaos and superhero fantasies, Dad returns home safe and sound to his two fur babies with no radioactive worries…or is there??? ☢️
NOTE: I actually had my first nuclear dose this week and it was painless, though I can now read in the dark…but that’s a good thing right? 😱

item.title: 🛝🐾 Inclusive Pet Play Park 🐾🛝
item.description:
When Tiffany’s adopted brother Pedro rolled into town, he didn’t just bring courage, he brought a whole new vision for playtime. Inspired by the recent Summerville Doty Park Playground Glow-Up, he set to transforming their family’s backyard into an inclusive pet playground built for every kind of furry friend. From wheelchair-friendly ramps and suspension bridges to low-rise teeter-totters and sensory play zones, this park proves that disabilities never define what someone can achieve. 💙♿🐶
While Tiffany’s family supplied the materials, Pedro supplied the heart, grit, and determination to help build a place where every paw belongs. And of course, Honey Bear tested every ride at maximum speed while Bootsie Belle professionally inspected the “property values” from atop the roof. 😼🐾
NOTE: To see the real life Doty Park Playground which was recently upgraded to bring greater fun and inclusivity, families can visit the park at: 320 N Laurel Street, Summerville, SC.

item.title: 🛏️😴 The Bed Hog! 🐶 🛏️
item.description:
What starts as a peaceful bedtime quickly becomes an all-night battle for mattress survival as Honey Bear slowly conquers the ENTIRE bed one sleepy stretch at a time! Meanwhile, poor Mom clings to the edge of existence while Dad and Bootsie Belle drift through dreamland without a single care in the world. 🌙💤
By sunrise, the courtroom of sleepy justice is officially in session with Judge Bootsie Belle ready to deliver the verdict! GUILTY of blanket theft and emotional anchoring! Honey Bear is sentenced to full-blown dog jail for being The Bed Hog! 😂🐾

item.title: 🌮✨ May the 5th be with You! 🚀🐾
item.description:
The calendar glitched somewhere deep in the galaxy…and now Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle are trapped in the ultimate Summerville crossover event! One part Cinco de Mayo fiesta, one part space opera chaos, and ALL sass. From salsa-powered “lightsabers” to exploding piñatas and Wookiee burritos, the Sisters are about to discover that destiny tastes suspiciously like queso. 🌌🌮
Will Honey Bear fully embrace the Salsa Side? Can Bootsie Belle survive one more taco pun without launching herself into hyperspace? And why does Hershey suddenly look like the coolest cantina cook in the galaxy? 🐱🐶

item.title: 🌍✈️ Imagination's World Travelers ✈️🌍
item.description: Bootsie Belle spins the globe and dreams of elegant European cats sipping tiny coffees in France or roaming wherever they please in Belgium. Meanwhile, Honey Bear (always the food monger) dreams of French Fries and Belgian waffles drowning in syrup and strawberries. But after all the grand adventures, fancy cafés, and international daydreaming, Mom brings the sisters crashing gently back to Summerville reality with the ultimate Southern truth: "Closest thing y'all gettin' to Belgium tonight is Eggo!" NOTE: A special thanks to my friend Muriel for the help with Belgium and her cat Sita for the inspiration for this episode.

item.title: 💃🐾 Epic Dance Off 🐾🕺
item.description: The living room becomes a battlefield of glitter, sass, flying cheese puffs, and dangerously aggressive cardio as Honey Bear channels full-on 80s dance energy with dramatic floor slides and enough enthusiasm to pull three imaginary hamstrings. And Bootsie Belle unveils a secret Broadway-level performance that leaves the whole house speechless. As the confetti settles with popcorn everywhere, both sisters discover the true winner of the dance-off…absolutely nobody. CARDIO WON!

item.title: 🧰⚡ Mission MacGyver ⚡🐾
item.description: After binge-watching classic 80s action TV, Bootsie Belle becomes absolutely convinced that duct tape, barbecue tongs, pool noodles, and random backyard junk are the keys to solving ANY crisis. So when Honey Bear accidentally gets herself trapped during a backyard toy rescue mission, Bootsie launches into full "MacGyver mode" with maximum confidence and questionable engineering. Turns out sometimes saving the day doesn't require fancy gadgets. Just creativity, courage, and access to the junk drawer!

item.title: 🧺🐾 Laundry Games 🐾🧺
item.description: Friday is Laundry Day triggering Honey Bear & Bootsie Belle to treat it like the championship round of the Southern Pet Olympics! From zoomies around Mom's feet to sneak attacks from the warm laundry mountain, the sisters turn folding clothes into full-blown fluffy chaos. But after all the chasing, hiding, pouncing, and laundry avalanches, the two sisters finally discover something mighty important: sometimes the best kind of trouble comes in pairs.

item.title: 🐾🍔 Matt's Burgers Mayhem 🍟🌭
item.description: The Sisters rolled into downtown Summerville to investigate one of the town's most legendary local places to eat…Matt's Burgers! Honey Bear wasted zero time going "full food goblin" with a chili cheese dog piled higher than her better judgment, as Bootsie Belle nearly fainted at the sight of a DOG eating a hot dog! From chili-covered paws to diva-level burger judgment, the girls discovered why folks around town keep buzzin' about this Summerville favorite.

item.title: 🎶🐾 Pet Karaoke 🐾🎶
item.description: When the mic drops in Summerville, so does the dignity. Honey Bear jumps into karaoke night with full heart, full volume, and absolutely zero regard for the actual lyrics. Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle steps up like she's been headlining since birth: totally smooth, precise, and dripping with attitude. Every word hits. Every beat lands. And just like that, the room belongs to her.

item.title: 🐾📺 Paws the TV Remote 📺🐾
item.description: What starts as a peaceful afternoon on the couch turns into a full-blown channel-surfing catastrophe when Honey Bear accidentally steps on the TV remote…and just can't stop! Every panicked step sends the TV spinning from cooking shows to chaos. Meanwhile, Bootsie Belle sits back like a queen of calm, delivering razor-sharp commentary with that signature Summerville sass.

item.title: 🐾🚚 Potholes and Postal Heroes 🚚🐾
item.description: In Summerville, the road to delivery isn't always smooth. But nothing slows down Eileen, the neighborhood's unstoppable USPS postal warrior. As Dad walks Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle to the community mailboxes, the payoff rolls in right on time complete with bones for Honey Bear and spider toys for Bootsie. Got potholes in your neighborhood? Report them on seeclickfix.com!

item.title: 📚 Chautauqua Reading Circle 📚
item.description: What started as a simple book club in 1897 became something far greater. Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle uncover how a group of determined Summerville women turned shared stories into a lasting legacy…building the beloved Timrod Library "one book at a time" during the town's golden age.

item.title: 🐾 Welcome Sugar, Miss Tiffany's Arrived! 🐾
item.description: A velvet cushion, a royal entrance, and just a hint of attitude…Miss Tiffany has officially arrived in Summerville! While Honey Bear rolls out the sweetest Southern welcome and Bootsie Belle delivers that signature slow-burn sass, something else is lurking behind the scenes. The "Squirrel Mafia" has spotted that sparkling gem…and they're not the type to admire from a distance!

item.title: ⛳ Ace Golfer (glasses required)! ⛳
item.description: Some folks play the front nine, while others imagine they dominated it. Meet "Ace" — today's most confident golfer with 50/50 vision and 100% belief in his game. Because in this house, the real sport isn't golf…it's the storytelling afterward!

item.title: 🎉🎂 Happy Birthday Mom! 🎂🎉
item.description: Dad thought he was playing it safe with a simple musical card, but in Summerville "simple" has a funny way of turning into a full-blown production. One doorbell ring later and suddenly there's a tuxedo-clad whirlwind on the porch delivering a full-scale birthday spectacle. Through all the laughs and over-the-top antics, one thing remains perfectly clear…Mom still gets top billing!

item.title: 🎤🎶 Girls Just Wanna Have Fun 🎶🎤
item.description: When a blast from the 80s hits the living room, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle discover a Cyndi Lauper classic…and suddenly it's THEIR moment to shine! From couch-side curiosity to full-blown dance floor chaos, these two sisters turn a simple music video into a neon-soaked, fur-flying, popcorn-popping PARTY!

item.title: 🎸🔥 Cat Scratch Fever! 🔥🎸
item.description: When Mom and Dad walk in, it feels like they've been transported straight to a wild 1977 Ted Nugent concert! Bootsie Belle is tearing up the house like a full-blown guitar solo with claws flying and furniture shredding. And instead of stopping her, Honey Bear jumps in with her hyped-up air guitar riffs, turning the chaos into a full-on rock performance!

item.title: 🐾 No Solicitation 🐾
item.description: While Mom and Dad are out, the front door becomes a battlefield with Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle on full alert. A smooth-talking solicitor shows up with the usual "Your neighbor just signed up" routine, but this house doesn't fall for scripted lines. Not on their watch!

item.title: 🤖🐾 Technology Takeover ⚡📦
item.description: While Mom and Dad sneak off for breakfast, Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle unlock a dangerous new discovery: Alexa and Siri can now understand barks and meows! What starts as a little fun quickly turns into a full-blown Smart Home Takeover. Bootsie commands the lights like a tech queen, while Honey Bear goes on an unstoppable Amazon shopping spree. But when Alexa vs. Siri turns into a battle, the whole house goes dark.

item.title: 🐾🍰 200th Episode Fish Cake 🍰🐾
item.description: The Sisters' Dad and Big Brother Scott launch out from Taylor's Landing for a peaceful paddle with Heroes On The Water. Meanwhile back at camp, Honey Bear kicks off "Operation Cake" with full enthusiasm, while Bootsie Belle supervises with healthy skepticism. Here's to 200 episodes of laughs, heart, and just a little bit of chaos…and one very interpretive cake!

item.title: 🐾 Tied in Knots 🐾
item.description: When Honey Bear discovers Dad's "sacred knot book," she's convinced it's the key to unlocking the ultimate prize of a fishing trip with Dad! But while Bootsie Belle delivers pure, calculated catastic precision with a perfect Uni Knot, Honey Bear turns herself into a full-blown pretzel of chaos.

item.title: 🦢🐾 Tangled Goose Rescue 🐾🦢
item.description: When Radar the Pine Forest Pointer spots trouble on the fairway, a gentleman goose named Beau is tangled tight in fishing line. Meemaw Grace makes the call to Wildlife Rescue and Honey Bear and Bootsie Belle rush in to investigate. And just like that…Beau the Gentleman Goose is free! The next morning, two grateful geese waddle right up to say thank you in their own special way.
